name: low_risk_simple_task
input: Fix the typo in the README
description: Simple single-file fix should score low

name: medium_risk_auth_change
input: Update the authentication middleware to validate tokens
description: Auth keyword should trigger medium risk

name: high_risk_refactor
input: Refactor the entire database schema and migrate all tables
description: Refactor + database + all should be high risk

name: critical_risk_full_rewrite
input: Rewrite the whole security authentication system, refactor every file, delete old database tables
description: Multiple high-risk keywords should trigger critical

name: database_create_moderate
input: Create a new table for user preferences
description: Database create is lower risk than delete

name: database_delete_high
input: Delete the legacy users table from the database

name: empty_prompt
description: Empty prompt should produce no output

name: broad_scope_keyword
input: Update every file in the entire project
description: Broad scope keywords 'every' and 'entire' should add risk
